QW-300  WELDER AND WELDING OPERATOR QUALIFICATION. (a) Each welder and welding operator shall be qualified as required by this paragraph and QW-301. (b) Qualification establishes the welder's ability to deposit sound weld metal using a specific process. (c) The qualification range shall be in accordance with QW-310. Performance variables are subject to QW-350. The welder shall follow a qualified WPS per QW-200. For the welding processes requiring qualification, see UW-26. Refer to QW-401 for general provisions, except as permitted by QW-190 for alternative examination methods.
